sessionName: Hyp A — incline 155 bump + pushdown 27.5 attempt (LOGGED)
intro: Logged 7-21: incline 155x5 RIR 2 landed -> 160 next Tue (Adj #195); pushdown 27.5 landed pain-clean (Adj #198); rear-delt repeat RIR 4/4 -> nudge 140 next Tue (Adj #200).

Done: 10/10/8/7 RIR 1/1/0/0 — step back from the debut, hold 70 (Adj #197)
Done: 12/11/8/7 RIR 1/0/0/0, no elbow signal — landed, both slots run 27.5 (Adj #198)
Done: 12/8/8 RIR 1/0/0 — first Tue 12, gate not met, keep rebuilding (Adj #199)
Done: 15/15 RIR 4/4 — repeat RIR 4 opener, nudge fires: 140 next Tue (Adj #200)

lift.warmup: Pre-lift wrist-extensor isometric 3x30 s/arm (10.A). 1-2 min dynamic: band pull-aparts, scap push-ups. Incline BB: bar x8, 95x5, 115x3, then working.
lift.cooldown: Tyler twists 3x15 + reverse Tyler 3x15 (daily dose). Daily SI prehab.

currentLoads.lastVerified: W14 Tue 7/21 (155×5 RIR 2 top + AMRAP 135×11 RIR 0)
currentLoads.note: 155 BUMP LANDED one click clear of the ≤RIR 1 revert (Adj #168 resolved) — second consecutive Build-scheme bump landing; AMRAP slipped 12→11 → e1RM ~185, TM 168 stands. §5 clean-reps rule → bump 160 next Tue (1×5 @ 160 + AMRAP @ 135); if 160×5 lands ≤RIR 1 → back to 155 (Adj #195)

First clean read at 165 proper (W12's ran behind the 170 mis-load) — sets 1-3 held the 8 floor with a clean front half, but set 3 ran to failure and set 4 fell to 6. Hold 165 — bump-eligible 170 on a clean 4×8 with set 3 RIR 1 (Adj #155/#179)

75→80 BUMP LANDED on load (Adj #156 resolved) — set 1 held the 10 floor @ RIR 1, sets 2-3 fell 9/8 to failure = standard new-load shape. Hold 80; re-earn the ladder condition (full 3×10 with sets 1-2 ≥RIR 1) before the next 5-lb step toward the pre-reset 85 (Adj #180)

Opener soft (RIR 3) a third week — mid-block eased a click vs W13, but the closers ran the prescribed last-2-to-failure for the first time, set 5's 14 the biggest set of the dose. Hold 30 — a firm opener (≤RIR 2) opens the bump conversation (Adj #127/#149/#169/#196)
Rebuild flat — same 44-rep total as the debut, reshuffled; sets 2-4 under the 12 floor, all to failure. Hold 35, rebuild to all-4-in-band before any further move; Tue slot unaffected (Adj #157/#181)

Step back from the 70 debut — opener lost its RIR 2, set 3 gave up the 10 floor (8, to failure), set 4 fell 8→7. Hold 70; bump-eligible 75 on an Adj #150-shape outing (openers ≥RIR 3, set 3 clean RIR 1) — further off after today. Sat slot unaffected (Adj #170/#197)
Half-step back from the W12 best — identical openers (RIR 3/2), set 3 gave back its 12 (11, to failure), set 4 nudged 8→9. Hold 60; the clean-with-reps-to-spare condition stands (Adj #182)

25→27.5 LANDED through the pain gate (Adj #183 resolved) — no elbow signal: set 1 held the 12 floor @ RIR 1, back three to failure = standard new-load shape. Both slots run 27.5 (Sat 7-25 included); no 30 until set 3 ≥RIR 1 at the full 12. Elbow clean — 6th consecutive session, §10.A clock intact (Adj #198)

Repeat RIR 4 opener + set 2 joined it — the Adj #173 condition FIRED: the full RIR 4/4 under-load pattern that drove 130→135. One-step nudge → 140 next Tue (W15), 2×15 target RIR 3 (Adj #95/#153/#200)

345→355 BUMP LANDED through the Adj #160 AM gate — swept 4×12 at the band floor, but sets 2-4 all to failure = the same zero-headroom landing as 345's debut, opener one notch better. Hold 355 — no 365 until sets 1-3 ≥RIR 1; future bumps stay AM-gated (Adj #185)

currentLoads.load: BW+10 lb at BOTH slots (hold, rebuild) — Tue to 3×12, Sat to 3×10
currentLoads.note: Tue rebuild — first 12 lands (set 1 @ RIR 1); sets 2-3 flat at 8 to failure — 3×12 gate not met (Adj #199). Sat gate rests on set 3 alone (Adj #184). Hold +10 both slots; no revert to BW

Re-read RESOLVED (Adj #121/#140/#162 chain closed) — normal rest restored, both sets at the 12 target @ RIR 3 = exactly the RPE 7 ask; the W10/W12 failure reads were execution artifacts, not a ceiling. Hold 130 — RIR 3 is the target here, not headroom to spend (Adj #186)
